subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in service! Blessed art thou, for thou hast arisen to serve the Cause of God and dwellest beneath the shade of the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قائم بر خدمت خوشا بحال تو که بر خدمت امرالله قیام نمودی و در ظل سدره منتهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God
